description: The Goethals-Seidel (GS) array constructs a Hadamard matrix of order 4v from four supplementary difference sets (SDS) over Z_v. For v=167 (prime, 3 mod 8), we need four blocks X0..X3 in Z_167 satisfying the constant autocorrelation-sum condition. This is the primary proven method for constructing Hadamard matrices of new orders.
mathematical_formalization: Find X_0..X_3 subsets of Z_167 with sum(|X_i|) = 167 + lambda, such that for all g != 0: sum_i |{(x,y) in X_i^2 : x-y=g}| = lambda.
implementation_hypothesis: Split blocks into two pairs, hash partial autocorrelation spectra, match. Use orbit reduction under Aut(Z_167) = Z_166.
experiment_seed: Parallel search over Z_167 with orbit reduction, symmetric/skew blocks first.
